name: Individual Tuna Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place tortilla on a small baking sheet.
3. Bake for 5 minutes, or until the tortilla begins to crisp.
4. Spread sauce across half of the edge of the tortilla.
5. Sprinkle tuna, mushrooms, and tomato over the tortilla.
6. Arrange bell pepper half-rings on top.
7. Sprinkle cheese over the pizza.
8. Bake for 8 to 10 more minutes, or until heated through.
